title: Gemini 2.5 Pro and Flash models now supported on pay-per-token endpoints
body:
Model Serving now supports the Google [Gemini 2.5 Pro](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#gemini-2-5-pro) and [Gemini 2.5 Flash](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#gemini-2-5-flash) models. You can access these models using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis) and they also support [Function calling](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/function-calling) and [Structured output](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/structured-outputs).

* See [Query reasoning models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-reason-models).
* See [Enrich data using AI Functions](/aws/en/large-language-models/ai-functions) for guidance on how to use the Gemini 2.5 models for batch inference.
